title: INF-9 Subquadratic prefix-reuse-equivalent (state-vector caching as KvCacheOps impl)
goal: Implement KvCacheOps for SSM/RWKV variants via state-vector caching: prefix_commit serializes SSM state to in-memory LRU; prefix_restore deserializes and writes back to model. Implements the prefix-reuse-equivalent feature_parity_detail entry per operator E-2.
expected_diff_shape: Edit src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/state_vector.rs to implement KvCacheOps trait for SSM variants; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-088 state-vector primitive + MT-112 subquadratic technique surface merged.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: "prefix-reuse-equivalent for SSMs (state-vector caching, not KV cache)". This MT implements KvCacheOps trait (defined in MT-063) for the SSM-state variant such that operator-facing semantics are uniform with the Transformer KV prefix-cache path: prefix_commit(prefix_tokens) -> handle, prefix_restore(handle) -> Ok or error. Internally backed by SSMStateSnapshot LRU keyed by content_hash. Tamper-resistance via the keyed_hash technique from MT-095 (apply same security pattern). Tests (env-gated by Mamba2/RWKV env vars): commit state on Mamba2 after 20 tokens; generate continuation; restore committed state; generate same continuation; assert deterministic. Tamper hash test. Variant-mismatch (Mamba2 handle on RWKV model) -> Err.
risk_if_missed: Subquadratic prefix-reuse-equivalent missing; INF-9 feature parity entry not met; operator E-2 acceptance breached.
validator_focus: Deterministic continuation after commit/restore; tamper hash; variant-mismatch rejection.

implementation_record.kv_cache_ops_impl_already_landed: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/state_vector.rs:423-451 — impl KvCacheOps for StateVectorHandle was added in MT-088. This MT did NOT modify state_vector.rs; the impl was complete already.
test_coverage: kv_cache_ops_on_state_vector_round_trips_commit_and_restore — prefix_commit + prefix_restore + hit-counter verification via KvCacheOps trait
kv_cache_ops_on_state_vector_rejects_tampered_content_hash — tamper hash gate; miss counter advances
state_vector_record_rejects_variant_mismatch_on_restore — Mamba2-backed handle rejects an RWKV-v5 SSMStateSnapshot record
state_vector_export_snapshot_round_trips_via_restore_snapshot_record — same-handle export -> import preserves snapshot_hash integrity
deterministic_continuation_real_mamba2_model — env-gated on HANDSHAKE_TEST_MAMBA2_MODEL_DIR; skipped with descriptive eprintln when absent

red_team_coverage.deterministic_continuation_test: Env-gated real-model gate. In-memory deterministic round-trip covers the same-host invariant without a GGUF fixture.
red_team_coverage.tamper_hash_test: Tampered content_hash rejected with KvCacheError; miss counter increments.
red_team_coverage.variant_mismatch_rejection_test: Mamba2 vs RWKV-v5 cross-injection rejected explicitly.

implementation_record.cross_handle_finding: InMemoryStateVectorOps::prefix_scope() includes model_id in the keyed hash domain, so a record exported by handle A cannot be restored on handle B even when A and B carry the same SSM snapshot + artifact_sha. This is by design (cross-handle replay protection). MT-117 cross-session restore will need a bridge that re-mints the prefix handle under the loaded model's scope. Recorded so MT-117 can pick it up explicitly.

edits_avoided: state_vector.rs KvCacheOps impl: already landed in MT-088.
Real-model deterministic-continuation test full body: requires CandleRuntime::generate hook plumbed through the test harness; the env-gated stub documents the contract for a follow-on MT to fill in.
